summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HarvestBid Farmers Auction Platform. Backend APIs are fully functional (100% success rate). Frontend has one critical issue on auctions page preventing proper loading, but homepage, authentication, dashboard, and auction detail pages work correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Select.Item components missing proper value props causing page crash
ui_bugs.error: A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents auctions page from loading completely

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all sections (hero, stats, featured auctions, categories, features, stories, CTA)
Backend API health check and all 15 endpoints working
Authentication flow works for both farmer and buyer roles
Dashboard loads correctly after login with user stats and auction cards
Create auction page accessible for farmers with all form fields
Auction detail page loads and displays auction information
Login to bid flow redirects correctly to auth page
Real-time auction data display with countdown timers
Bid history and current bid display functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Select component issue on auctions page: Ensure all SelectItem components in /app/frontend/src/pages/Auctions.jsx have proper non-empty string value props. The error occurs in location and sort select components where empty string values are being used.
